  1. de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config

Verwendungen von Package
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config

Packages, die de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config verwenden
Package
Beschreibung
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config
Contains configuration models and parsing logic that bind TOML settings to the engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.controller
Contains the main execution controllers and initialization factories for the Genetic Algorithm framework.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.cryptanalysis
Implementation of the Cryptanalysis substitution cipher solver.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.knapsack
Implementation of the Knapsack optimization problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.sudoku
Implementation of the Sudoku puzzle problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.symreg
Implementation of the Symbolic Regression problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.tsp
Implementation of the Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP).
  • Von de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config verwendete Klassen in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    AppConfig
    Root configuration class for the application.

    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    AppConfig
    Root configuration class for the application.
  • Von de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.cryptanalysis verwendete Klassen in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    CryptanalysisGAConfig
    Configuration class for setting up a genetic algorithm (GA) used for classical cipher cryptanalysis.
  • Von de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.knapsack verwendete Klassen in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    KnapsackGAConfig
    Configuration class for setting up a genetic algorithm (GA) to solve the 0/1 knapsack optimization problem.
  • Von de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.sudoku verwendete Klassen in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config
    Klasse
    Beschreibung

  • Von de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.tsp verwendete Klassen in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    TSPGAConfig
    Configuration class for setting up a genetic algorithm (GA) to solve the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP).
